data: Revise how to ask for clarification politely at work

message: Let's revise how to ask for clarification politely when instructions are unclear at work.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"Could you please clarify [instruction] so that I can [action]?"

This structure shows your manager that you want to complete the task correctly.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to ask for clarification about a process

1.I am confused about the review process, just tell me what to do.
2.Could you please clarify the review process so that I can submit my work on time?

Correct answer: 2

Select the correct way to ask for clarification about priorities

1.Could you please clarify the priority of tasks so that I can plan my schedule accordingly?
2.There are too many tasks and I do not know which one to start with.

Correct answer: 1
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&budget&&limit so&&that I&&can prepare&&the&&cost&&estimate correctly

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your manager sends an email with unclear next steps. How do you ask for clarification?'

'2. A colleague gives you instructions for a handover task. How do you ask for clarification?'

'3. Your supervisor explains a new process but skips some details. How do you ask for clarification?'

'4. Your team leader gives you a confusing brief. How do you ask for clarification politely?'

'5. Your manager mentions a change in plans. How do you ask for clarification to proceed correctly?'"
